rulings.Case Title: MARY GLASPIE FRANK VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 7, Plaintiff's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1008. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion For Relief From The Courts Discovery Order Ordering Entry Of Default;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 1, Defendant's Motion for Relief From the Court's Discovery Order Ordering Entry of Default is continued to May 26, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than May 8, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike P. Singer, R. Singer Cross Complaint As To Alice Tse
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 2, CROSS DEFENDANT ALICE TSE Notice Of Motion To Strike P. Singer, R. Singer Cross Complaint As To Alice Tse is DENIED. The third cause of action as alleged (see paragraphs 36, 52) does not arise out of protected activity. Statements made by Tse regarding this litigation are not alleged as the basis for the third cause of action. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: 2882-2898 1/2 23RD STREET LLC VS. DIONIS OLIVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 3, DEFENDANT JUAN COSIO, MIGUEL COLON, REYNALDO AMAYA, REYNALDO AMAYA, ROSA AMAYA, CARLOTTA AMAYA, ZHU CHEN, CRAIG CASTELLANT, CHARLENE DOBBS, DANIEL COSIO, DIONIS OLIVARES, SANTOS FLORES, LEILA SALAZAR, ARIEL LOPEZ, JORGE NAVAS, ELENA MARTINEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is continued to May 13, 2015 to be heard in Department 502 at 9:30 a.m. Opposing party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy of the opposition papers (SFLR 2.6B) to department 501 no later than May1, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 4, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint filed April 29, 2015. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CHOY VS. KAI CHEONG CHIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 5 (part 1 of 2), DEFENDANT KAI CHIU Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is GRANTED, Defendant shall file a response no later than May 4, 2015. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CHOY VS. KAI CHEONG CHIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 5 (part 2 of 2), Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Gitmed v. General Motors Co. (1994) 26 Cal.App.4th 824. = (501/SB)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CHOY VS. KAI CHEONG CHIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT KAI CHIU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal OFF CALENDAR DUPLICATE ENTRY. (501)

rulings.Case Title: MARK GIN VS. SANJEEV RAI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, May 01, 2015, Line 6, DEFENDANT SANJEEV RAI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer and standing. = (501/SB)
